rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JAMES E TUCKER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issues remain unaddressed since the initial hearing on 06/06/2023: 1) The deferred assessment fees must be paid. 2) If the petitioner intends to request her fees, the petition must be amended with supporting time records. The Court is to determine whether to deny a further continuance and take this petition under submission at this time, given that the petition has been pending for more than 6 months, and to order payment of fees and costs of the conservator's attorneys as prayed, order payment of the assessment fees in full, and allow the remaining cash of the estate to be applied toward the conservator's unspecified fees. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF LIAN ANAIS JEONG ENGLE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR TERMINATION OF GUARDIANSHIP of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Judicial Council form GC-255 is only appropriate when an estate either has been completely exhausted or is within the parameters set forth in Probate Code Section 2628 (small estate) and accountings have not been required. This is not the case here. There are also multiple issues with the petition, such as incomplete item 1, incorrect allegation in items 3 and 4, and no notice or proposed order. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF LIAN ANAIS JEONG ENGLE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Final Report Of Guardian With Final Account Or On Waiver Of Account
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The guardian has not yet filed a petition, prepared on pleading paper, to formally terminate this guardianship estate, as ordered on 9/14/21. The final report must include an accounting or may be on waiver of account if the former minor waives an accounting. If the former minor waives the accounting by the guardian, the former minor must appear at the hearing of the final report. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARION HALL REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: First Account And Report Of Successor Trustee, Petition For Its Settlement Thereof And Payment Of Attorney Fees To Successor'S Trustee'S Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/20/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No courtesy copies of papers filed on 12/18/23 and 12/19/23 (after the 12/12/23 deadline specified by the judge at the hearing on 11/21/23) have been received yet by the examiner. (3) No proof of service of the correct, complete, 30 days' notice has been filed yet. (4) No supplement to the petition has been filed yet, setting forth the names and last known addresses of all VESTED or contingent beneficiaries. The grantor is still the only beneficiary. There are also numerous remainder residuary beneficiaries named in the trust. (5) Notice must also include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] (6) The conservatorship or trust case number must be noted in parentheses under any pleading caption in the related matter. [LRSF 14.47 B.3.] (7) Schedule 3 (Assets on Hand) does not show the fair market value. [Probate Code Section 1063(a).] (8) The liabilities schedule should show the dates such liabilities were incurred and, if there was an order authorizing fees and costs, the date of the order. Deadline is 2/7/24 for providing the assigned examiner a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).] In addition to the requirements of CRC 2.111 and 7.102, all pleadings must also show the name and representative capacity, if any, of the party for whom the attorney is appearing, e.g., John Jones, Executor. "Petitioner" or "Respondent" alone is not sufficient. [LRSF 14.15 A.])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DOUGLAS P. ALLEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/9/2024. The following issues ato be cleared: (1) Need clarification if petition seeks the distribution to be made to the personal rep in the sister state (North Carolina) case instead of making direct distribution to the beneficiaries. Prob. Code sec. 12540. The distribution to sister state personal rep may be made upon request by presenting why said distribution is in the best interest of the estate or interested persons. If so, a certified copy of valid Letters (or equivalent) to be conventionally filed. Certification must have been within 60 days. (2) Need waiver of account signed by all residual beneficiaries. Petition alleges that the sister state personal rep is the sole beneficiary; however, the will named several residual beneficiaries. The sister state personal rep is not the sole beneficiary. (3) Proposed distribution of the omnibus clause to identify the beneficiary. (4) Proposed order to be revised accordingly. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHEE 1988 TRUST DATED AUGUST 15, 1988
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For An Order To Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, because the only two other interested parties consented to the petition. The proof of service filed on 12/7/23 reflects that the wrong form of notice (DE-120 instead of DE-115) was served on 12/1/23 for a hearing on 12/26/23, which was not 30 days' notice, and the instructions for remote appearance were not attached to the Notice of Hearing, as required by LRSF 14.1 C.6. No endorsed filed copy of the order will be returned, as no SASE was provided. (Unless there is some question about the validity of a trust or the named successor trustee's authority to serve as such, this Court does not ordinarily find and confirm that a trust is valid or that the successor trustee is the trustee. When papers are not filed electronically, each paper presented for filing must contain two prepunched normal-sized holes, centered 2-1/2 inches apart and 5/8 inch from the top of the paper. [CRC 2.115.] This includes proposed orders. Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).])
